Bash(cd C:/Users/Otmane/Desktop/Workspace/Projets/granitalent && python -c "
import ast, sys
for f in ['backend/main.py', 'backend/services/gemini_live.py']:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'{f}: AST parse OK'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'{f}: SYNTAX ERROR at line {e.lineno}: {e.msg}'\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
print\('All files pass AST validation'\)
")
